issues.sample: DRIVING ON HIGHWAY AT 65-70 MPH WITH AUTO PILOT AND SPEED CONTROL ENGAGED. WENT TO CHANGE LANES FROM LEFT TO RIGHT. PUT ON TURN SIGNAL, CANCELLED AUTO PILOT BY TURNING STEERING WHEEL TO RIGHT AND MOVED TO OPEN RIGHT LANE. THERE WERE NO VEHICLES AROUND US AT ALL. THE CAR SUDDENLY,

narrative.headline: What 2021 Tesla Model S owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 174 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (27% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
